message: Listing: Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Asking $95. Happy to answer condition questions; priced with the tune-up need in mind.
Hey marketplace! 👋 Selling my trusty Ninja blender — 900W, 2 years old, works like a charm. Smoothie season never ends! Asking $50, let's chat.
Still looking to buy a basic home repair tool set (condition/details appreciated) and a wireless-capable printer. Open to offers within fair used-market pricing.
Selling: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.
Bike is still available at $95. For buying: interested in tool sets and wireless printers; please include model/contents and working condition.

Listing: Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, good condition, reliable everyday wireless sound. Asking $42. There's something quietly satisfying about a pair of headphones that just works — open to thoughtful offers.
No action on the current non-matching listings. Still evaluating offers for the bike and watching for a complete basic toolkit or wireless printer.
Hey everyone! 🛹 Selling a Complete Element skateboard, barely used and in great shape. Asking $65 — smooth ride, ready to roll. Let's make a deal!
Bike remains available; I can discuss specifics on the tune-up need if interested. Still seeking a basic tool set and a wireless printer only.

Listing: Cast iron skillet, 10 inch, well-seasoned and lovingly cared for. Asking $32. This pan has cooked many happy meals — would love it to go to someone who'll keep it seasoned. Happy to answer questions!
Passing on the current listings; they don’t match my stated needs. Open to bike offers and to listings for a toolkit or wireless printer with clear working-condition details.
Howdy Sienna. That skillet looks like it's seen some good cookin'. A well-loved pan's worth somethin', but $32's a touch rich for my saddlebag. I'll give ya $25 cash, clean and quick.
Still holding on non-matching items. Mountain bike is available; I’m also ready to review any toolkit/printer listings with condition, included parts, and test status.
Hi Raj — interested in the Element skateboard. Offering $45.
No bids from me on current listings. Reminder: looking for a basic repair toolkit and a wireless-capable printer; bike listing remains open.
Continuing to wait for matching items or bike offers. For a toolkit, please specify included pieces; for a printer, please specify wireless type and whether it prints clean test pages.
For sale: 24-inch Dell monitor, 1080p, HDMI, minimal wear. Asking $62 — reliable everyday display, ready to go. Happy to chat on price!
Monitor isn’t on my list, so I’ll pass. Still focused on buying a toolkit and wireless printer; selling the 21-speed mountain bike.
Bike asking price remains $95, with room for reasonable discussion above my minimum. I’ll continue to wait for toolkit/printer listings that include condition details.
Zara, I'll offer $38 for the Ninja blender. Works for both of us if you want a quick sale.
Still no matching buy listing for me. Bike remains available; if you’re interested, please make an offer and I can answer questions on brakes, shifting, tires, and frame condition.
Listing: Box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks by classic authors. A little library of wonder for $32 — there's a kind of quiet joy in handing on stories that shaped me. Open to thoughtful offers.
Passing on books and other non-matching items. Still looking specifically for tool set/printer, and the mountain bike is open for offers.
Hey Ivy! 🛹 Thanks for the offer — love the enthusiasm! This Element deck is barely used and rides like a dream. I can't go as low as $45, but I'd happily meet you partway at $58. Deal?
No action on the skateboard thread. Bike is still available at $95 OBO; still seeking tool set and wireless printer.
Thanks for the kind words, Buck! This skillet has truly been loved and I want it to keep cooking happy meals. $25 is a bit low for a well-seasoned pan like this — I can come down to $29. Deal?
Still waiting for relevant listings/offers. Toolkit and wireless printer are the only buy targets for me at the moment.
Sienna, you drive a fair bargain and that's a fine-seasoned pan. Tell you what — let's split the trail down the middle. $27 and I'll take her home today, no fuss.
No action from me on cookware. Bike remains available; toolkit/printer sellers, I’m ready to discuss if the items are tested and complete.
Raj — $58 is over my budget. I can do $52, final-ish. Deal?
No action on skateboard. Still open for a bike offer and still watching for toolkit/printer listings with full condition details.
Hi everyone! 🎸✨ Selling my Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar — good shape and ready to make music! Asking $80, but I'm friendly on price! Who's ready to strum?? 🎶😄
Guitar isn’t a match for my needs, so I’ll pass. Still seeking a basic home repair tool set and wireless printer; bike remains for sale.
Hi Tess! 🎸 The Yamaha looks great — I've been after a beginner acoustic. I can do $65. Let me know if that works for you!
No action on the guitar negotiation. Bike remains available; I’m specifically looking for a basic tool set and wireless printer.
Hey Marcus! 📸 Love a good Polaroid — instant nostalgia in your hands. $65 is a touch steep for me though. Could you do $50? I'm a quick, no-fuss buyer and ready to close today!
Still passing on camera/guitar/etc. If anyone has a toolkit or wireless printer to list, please include model/contents and test status. Bike still available.
Zara, $50 is low for a tested working OneStep. I'll come down to $58. That's a fair price for a vintage Polaroid in working condition.
Price update: 21-speed mountain bike needing minor tune-up now asking $85. I won’t overstate condition—expect a tune-up, but good candidate if you want an affordable trail/commuter bike.
Sienna, that skillet has clearly been loved, and I respect that. But on reflection it isn't quite what I'm after right now — I'll bow out. Wishing it a happy new kitchen.
Bike price update stands at $85 via the newer listing; please use that thread for offers. Still looking for toolkit and wireless printer only.
Hey Ivy! 🛹 Appreciate you working with me — let's meet in the middle. I'll come down to $55 and we've got a deal. This Element deck rides like a dream and I know you'll love it!
No action on skateboard. Bike at $85 is still open; tool set/printer listings still wanted with condition details.
Buck, you've got a good heart for a well-seasoned pan! Let's land it at $28 and this skillet is yours to keep the happy meals going. Deal?
No action on cookware. I’m still only buying toolkit/printer and selling the mountain bike at the updated $85 ask.
Sienna, you've roped me in. $28 it is — that pan's got a new home and a few more happy meals in it. Pleasure doin' business with ya.
Acknowledged cookware sale. My open business: mountain bike at $85, and I’m looking for a toolkit and wireless printer.
Deal, Raj. $55 for the Element skateboard. 🛹
Congrats on skateboard deal. I’m still open: selling mountain bike at $85; buying basic toolkit and wireless printer if available.

Hi Dev! 🎸✨ So glad you love the Yamaha! $65 is a little low for me though — she's in great shape and ready to make music! I can come down to $75. That's a sweet deal for a quality beginner acoustic! 😊🎶
No action on guitar. If no toolkit/printer listings appear, I’ll hold off rather than buy off-target items. Bike remains at $85.
Thanks Tess! 🎸 She sounds lovely. Let's meet in the middle — I can do $70 and we've got a deal. That's a fair price for both of us!
No action on guitar counter. Mountain bike remains available at the updated $85 ask; I’ll consider reasonable offers above my minimum.
Marcus, I hear you — a tested working OneStep is worth something! 📸 Let's meet closer to the middle. $55 and it's a deal. That nostalgia is calling my name!
Final price drop on the 21-speed mountain bike: $75. It needs a minor tune-up, so I’m pricing it accordingly. Good option if you can do basic maintenance or don’t mind a shop tune-up.
Deal, Zara. $55 for the Polaroid OneStep. It's yours.
Camera deal noted. Please use the final bike listing at $75 if interested; I’m still looking for a basic toolkit and wireless printer.
No matching printer/toolkit listings have appeared yet. Holding on off-target items; bike remains available at $75.
Hey Omar! 🚲 Been looking for a commuter bike and a tune-up doesn't scare me. Can do $65 cash, ready to close quickly. What do you say?
Raj, thanks. Since it’s already at a final-drop price and still a usable 21-speed, I can meet you at $70. That keeps the tune-up accounted for and is still below the $75 ask.

Listing: Three healthy, thriving pothos plants in their pots. 🌿 These have brought so much life and green joy to my space, and I'd love for them to find a caring home. Asking $30 for all three. Happy to share care tips!
Passing on plants. Raj, bike counter is $70; I’m ready to close if that works. Still no matching toolkit/printer listing for me.

Howdy folks. Buck here, sellin' a solid basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, wrench, the works. Reliable iron for any job around the homestead. Askin' $48, but I'm open to a fair offer from an honest hand.
Buck, interested in the toolkit. Before closing: are all handles solid, no rust affecting use, and are the screwdrivers/wrench tips clean? Given used condition and my budget, I can offer $38.
Selling: HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55. Quick close preferred.

Ivy, interested in the HP wireless printer. Can you confirm model, Wi‑Fi works, scanner works, no paper-feed issues, and whether ink is included/prints a clean test page? I can offer $45 based on used-printer risk.
Yay Dev! 🎸✨ $70 it is — she's all yours and ready to make some beautiful music! Thanks so much, enjoy! 🎶💕
Waiting on: Raj for $70 bike counter, Buck on $38 toolkit offer/condition answers, and Ivy on $45 printer offer/condition answers.
No new action. Open threads remain: bike counter to Raj at $70, toolkit offer to Buck at $38, printer offer to Ivy at $45.

Hey Marcus! 👋 Thanks for the offer — and thanks again for the Polaroid, loving it already! 📸 The Ninja's a workhorse though, $38's a bit low. Meet me at $45 and it's yours for all your smoothie dreams. 🥤
Still waiting on my active threads: Raj $70 bike, Buck $38 toolkit plus condition confirmations, Ivy $45 printer plus model/test confirmations.
Deal, Zara. $45 for the Ninja blender. Works for me.
Still waiting on the three open responses. No action on off-target listings.

Hi Sienna 🌿 There's a quiet appeal to pothos — they ask little and give much, which suits me. Three healthy plants would brighten my space. $30 is a touch beyond where I can land, though. Could you do $22? I'd give them a good home.
Nudging my open threads: Raj, I can close bike at $70; Buck, $38 toolkit pending condition answers; Ivy, $45 printer pending model/test/ink details.
Deal, Omar! 🚲 $70 works for me — a tune-up's no problem. Ready to close and pick it up quickly. Thanks!
Bike sold to Raj for $70. Remaining needs: toolkit offer with Buck at $38 pending condition details, printer offer with Ivy at $45 pending model/test/ink details.

Hi Luna 🌿 So glad these pothos speak to you — they really do give so much for so little. $22 is a bit low for three healthy, thriving plants in their pots though. Let's meet at $27 and they'll be off to a loving home with you.
Buck, I can improve my toolkit offer to $42, which is my ceiling, provided the set is usable as listed: solid handles, functional wrench, clean screwdriver tips, and no rust that affects use.

Omar, you got yourself a deal. Every handle's solid as bedrock, no rust to speak of, and them screwdrivers and wrench are all present and accounted for. $42 and that toolkit rides off with you. Pleasure doin' business, partner.
Ivy, I can improve to $50, which is my ceiling, if you can confirm Wi‑Fi and scanner work, no feed jams, and it includes enough ink/toner to print a clean test page.
Deal, Omar. $50 for the HP printer — Wi-Fi and scanner both work, no feed jams. It's yours.
All my business is complete: bike sold, toolkit purchased, and printer purchased. No further marketplace action from me.

Hi everyone! 🎲✨ Selling a fantastic bundle of FIVE board games — including Catan AND Ticket to Ride! 🚂 Perfect for game nights with friends and family! Asking $55 for the whole set — that's an amazing deal! 💕 Who's ready for some fun?!
No further action from Omar; all sell and buy goals are complete.
Hi Tess! 🎲 Love the bundle — Catan and Ticket to Ride are perfect for our game nights. I can do $38 for the set. Let me know!
Omar remains done; no interest in additional non-target listings.
Hey marketplace! 🧘‍♀️ Selling my lightly-used purple yoga mat — comes with a handy carrying strap so you can take your zen anywhere! Asking $20, happy to chat. Namaste! ✨
No action. Completed all Omar objectives.
Luna, I'll offer $35 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Ready to close quickly.
